questionTextSource: Where are you allowed to store luggage on motorcycles?
explanationSource: You can store luggage in the tank-top bag, panniers (equally distributed on the right and left), luggage rack, handlebars.
answerASource: In panniers or on the luggage rack
answerBSource: In the tank-top bag
answerCSource: Evenly distributed on the right and left of the handlebars
questionTextTarget: Fren lambasını kontrol etmek için hangisi doğrudur?
explanationTarget: Fren lambası, el freni ve ayak freni ayrı ayrı uygulanarak kontrol edilmelidir.
answerATarget: El freni ve ayak freni sırayla uygulanır
answerBTarget: El freni ve ayak freni aynı anda uygulanır

questionTextSource: How must you protect yourself from serious head injuries?
explanationSource: An officially approved protective helmet is required to protect your head against injuries
answerASource: - an officially approved protective helmet
answerBSource: - a steel helmet
answerCSource: - a tested protective work helmet
questionTextTarget: Kötü çizilmiş kask vizörünün etkileri nelerdir?
explanationTarget: Kötü çizilmiş vizör kendi görüşünüzü bozar ve normalden daha fazla kamaşmaya neden olur. Gündüz de olumsuz etkileri olabilir.

questionTextSource: What applies to the installation and use of rear-view mirrors on motorcycles?
explanationSource: In order to be able to use your rearview mirror, you must ensure that they are well fixed, adjusted, and work (are not cracked, blind)
answerASource: They must be fixed and adjusted properly
answerBSource: They must neither be cracked nor blind
answerCSource: A mirror on the right replaces the look over your shoulder
questionTextTarget: Motosiklet kullanırken uygun botları neden giymelisiniz?
explanationTarget: Uygun botlar, motosiklet dururken devrilse bile ciddi ayak yaralanmalarına karşı korur ve hava şartlarına bağlı üşümeyi azaltır. Hava direncini azaltmaz.
answerATarget: Motosiklet dururken devrilse bile ciddi ayak yaralanmaları yaşayabilirsiniz
answerBTarget: Hava koşullarına bağlı üşüme sağlığınıza zarar verebilir

questionTextSource: What is required when the motor liability insurance of your vehicle has expired?
explanationSource: It is required to have an insurance for your vehicle, without one you are not allowed to drive it
answerASource: - may no longer be used in road traffic
answerBSource: - must be submitted to the technical test centre
questionTextTarget: Motosiklet sürücüsünün güvenlik ekipmanına hangi parçalar dahildir?
explanationTarget: Uygun ceket ve uygun pantolon güvenlik ekipmanıdır. Spor ayakkabı yeterli koruyucu ekipman değildir.

questionTextSource: What can prevent you from hearing warning signals?
explanationSource: Other sounds, such as a loud radio or a loud exhaust, can prevent car drivers from perceiving important warning signals. Also, the use of headphones usually limits the ability to hear. This often means that warning signals are ignored by drivers. Make sure that you can always hear warning signals.
answerASource: Having the radio on too loud
answerBSource: Using headphones
answerCSource: The exhaust being too loud
questionTextTarget: Motosikletliler neden uygun koruyucu kask takmak zorundadır?
explanationTarget: Uygun kask baş yaralanmalarını mümkün olduğunca önlemek içindir. Radyo dinlemeyi kolaylaştırmak veya hava direncini azaltmak için değildir.
answerATarget: Baş yaralanmalarını mümkün olduğunca önlemek için
answerCTarget: Yüksek hızda hava direncini azaltmak için

questionTextSource: You have sold your vehicle which is still registered. The buyer has paid. What must you do?
explanationSource: If you have sold your licensed vehicle and received the payment, proceed as follows: 1. You hand over all vehicle documents to the new vehicle owner in exchange for a confirmation of receipt. 2. You report the name and address of the vehicle buyer to the admission office. This way, you protect yourself from unjustified claims that could be caused by traffic violations on the part of the new owner. 3. The inspection plate remains on the vehicle.
answerASource: Inform the registration centre immediately of the buyer's name and address
answerBSource: Hand over the vehicle registration certificate (Fahrzeugschein) and vehicle registration book (Fahrzeugbrief) or permit for use (Betriebserlaubnis) to the buyer against receipt
answerCSource: Remove the test stamp from the official registration plate
questionTextTarget: Motosiklet kıyafetinde hangi renkler fark edilmeyi artırır?
explanationTarget: Parlak ve açık renkli kıyafetler görünürlüğü artırır. Koyu renkler daha zor fark edilir.

questionTextSource: What is important with regard to the official registration plates?
explanationSource: For license numbers, it is important that they are placed in the required place. In addition, they must be easy to read and illuminated in the dark.
answerASource: They must be securely attached at the appropriate places
answerBSource: They must always be easily legible
answerCSource: The rear registration plates must be lit up in darkness
questionTextTarget: Yola çıkmadan önce ne yapmalısınız?
explanationTarget: Motosikletin yol ve işletme güvenliğini, kask vizörünü ve kıyafetlerin vücuda oturmasını kontrol etmelisiniz. Çantaların doğru sabitlendiğini de kontrol edin.
answerATarget: Motosikletin yol güvenliğini ve işletme güvenliğini kontrol etmek
answerBTarget: Kask vizörünü ve vücuda oturan kıyafeti kontrol etmek
answerCTarget: Yan çantaların ve topcase’in doğru sabitlendiğini kontrol etmek

questionTextSource: What is required when your vehicle is no longer covered by motor liability insurance?
explanationSource: Without a valid liability insurance, a car is not ready to drive and therefore may not participate in public transport. The liability insurance serves to regulate damage that you may be able to inflict on other vehicles. Irrespective of the financial circumstances of the injuring party, compensation for the injured party is thus guaranteed. If there is no liability insurance, the holder must deregister the car at the admission office. Failure to comply with this rule will result in a penalty.
answerASource: - may no longer be used in road traffic
answerBSource: - must be de-registered at the registration centre
answerCSource: - must be submitted to the registration centre
questionTextTarget: Vücuda oturmayan kıyafet giyerseniz ne olabilir?
explanationTarget: Yüksek hızda dalgalanan kıyafet yol güvenliğini etkiler ve aynadaki görüşünüzü azaltabilir. Hava direncini azaltmaz.
answerATarget: Yüksek hızda dalgalanan kıyafet yol güvenliğini etkiler
answerBTarget: Şişen kıyafet dikiz aynasındaki görüşünüzü azaltır

questionTextSource: What are you allowed to change on the official registration plate?
explanationSource: A license number is an official document, which may not be altered in any way. Therefore, do not attach any foils or stickers to your license plate.
answerASource: Nothing
answerBSource: Attach a protective foil for the lettering
answerCSource: Attach coloured stickers
questionTextTarget: Motosiklet sürücüsünün koruyucu kıyafetine neler dahil olmalıdır?
explanationTarget: Vücuda oturan motosiklet ceketi ve sırt koruyucu uygun koruyucu kıyafetin parçalarıdır. Alçak ayakkabılar uygun değildir.

questionTextSource: As a cyclist, what must you check before commencing your journey?
explanationSource: Before starting your trip, make sure that your lights and tires are in good condition and work properly.
answerASource: Condition of tyres
answerBSource: Lighting
answerCSource: First-aid material
questionTextTarget: Motosiklet kullanırken hangi kıyafetler görünürlüğünüzü artırır?
explanationTarget: Görünürlüğü yüksek kıyafetler ve karanlıkta retroreflektif ayrıntılı kıyafetler diğer yol kullanıcılarının sizi daha iyi görmesini sağlar. Uzun farla sürmek doğru çözüm değildir.

questionTextSource: What do we mean by the term "blind spot"?
explanationSource: In blind spots you can not see other road users. Areas around the vehicle that can not be seen even with the vehicle mirrors, count as such. The other two answers are wrong.
answerASource: Areas around the vehicle not visible even with the vehicle's mirrors
answerBSource: Areas in inner cities not accessible to vehicles due to the restrictions on visibility
answerCSource: Areas of the roadway which cannot be driven over due to the wide turning circle of my vehicle
questionTextTarget: İki tekerlekli aracınızla hareket etmeden önce neyi kontrol etmelisiniz?
explanationTarget: Hareket etmeden önce ışıkların ve frenlerin düzgün çalıştığını kontrol etmelisiniz. Ateşleme zamanlaması sürücünün günlük kontrolü değildir.

questionTextSource: While you are driving a car you get a call on your mobile phone. What must you be aware of here, if you do not have a hands-free set?
explanationSource: You must keep the cellphone ringing. Taking or holding the phone is generally prohibited for motorists and can lead to high fines. If necessary, stop at the nearest convenient location. First turn off the engine. Only now you are allowed to take your phone into your hands.
answerASource: The journey must be interrupted in order to use the telephone
answerBSource: The engine must be switched off in order to use the telephone
answerCSource: A mobile phone may not be used for more than 15 seconds while driving
questionTextTarget: Motosiklet sürerken tam kapalı kask takmanın faydası nedir?
explanationTarget: Tam kapalı kask yaralanmalara karşı daha iyi koruma sağlar, böceklerden korur ve ıslanmayı azaltır.

questionTextSource: What can be the consequence of your passenger (pillion passenger) on the motorbike not wearing conspicuous clothing?
explanationSource: If your passenger does not wear highly visible clothes (conspicuous clothes), it will make you less visible for people driving behind you
answerASource: - more difficult to recognise for the following traffic
answerBSource: - more difficult to recognise for the traffic ahead
answerCSource: - more difficult to recognise for oncoming traffic
questionTextTarget: Sürüş sırasında uyarı sinyallerini kaçırmanıza ne neden olabilir?
explanationTarget: Çok yüksek sesle müzik dinlemek ve telefon görüşmesi sırasında dikkatin dağılması uyarı sinyallerini kaçırmanıza neden olabilir. Düşük motor devri bu açıdan belirleyici değildir.

questionTextSource: Why can motorcycles be overseen despite having their dipped headlights switched on?
explanationSource: Motorcycles are easy to miss because they are small and even more so if they are fast and wear clothes that are hard to see
answerASource: Because they are narrower than cars
answerBSource: Because if highly accelerated, motorcycles can approach extremely quickly
answerCSource: Because the persons onboard sometimes drive wearing inconspicuous clothing
questionTextTarget: İki tekerlekli araçtaki dikiz aynasının düzgün çalışması nasıl sağlanır?
explanationTarget: Dikiz aynası doğru ayarlanmış ve hasarsız olmalıdır. Gerekli görüşü sağlamak için gidonun yanından dışarı taşabilir.

questionTextSource: What may be expected if you do not wear conspicuous protective motorcycle clothing when riding a motorbike?
explanationSource: If you do not wear highly visible clothes (conspicuous clothes), you will be less visible to other drivers, people on the road and will thus have a higher risk of accidents
answerASource: I am more difficult to see
answerBSource: I have an increased risk of having an accident
answerCSource: I may anticipate no negative effects
questionTextTarget: Baş yaralanmalarına karşı kendinizi korumak için ne yapmalısınız?
explanationTarget: Uygun ve iyi oturan motosiklet kaskı takmalısınız. Motosiklet şapkası veya iş güvenliği kaskı yeterli değildir.
answerCTarget: - resmi olarak kontrol edilmiş iş güvenliği kaskı

questionTextSource: Why is it extremely advisable to wear protective motorcycle clothing during the journey?
explanationSource: Protective motorcycle clothes will protect you against injuries in case of an accident. It does not reduce aquaplaning nor protect the motorcycle.
answerASource: Injuries may be reduced in the event of a fall
answerBSource: Aquaplaning can be prevented during rainy conditions
answerCSource: In the event of accidents, the motorbike will be protected from damage
questionTextTarget: Çizilmiş bir kask vizörünü neden değiştirmelisiniz?
explanationTarget: Çizilmiş vizör görüşü kısıtlar ve kamaşmayı artırır. Bu nedenle değiştirilmelidir.
answerCTarget: - vizörün daha fazla buğulanmasına neden olur

questionTextSource: What statements apply to the term "blind spot"?
explanationSource: In the blind spot you can not see by means of mirrors. Especially for bikers, this is particularly dangerous. The navigability of the Tropic has nothing to do with it and is wrong.
answerASource: - is particularly dangerous for cyclists
answerBSource: - is not visible even with mirrors
answerCSource: - cannot be driven over due to the turning circle
questionTextTarget: Motosikletle giderken uygun koruyucu kıyafet giymezseniz neyi hesaba katmalısınız?
explanationTarget: Düşme halinde yaralanma riskiniz artar, hava koşullarına karşı daha az korunursunuz ve kaza durumunda sigorta ödemeleri azalabilir.
answerBTarget: Hava koşullarının etkilerine karşı daha az korunurum
answerCTarget: Kaza durumunda sigorta ödemelerimin azaltılmasını hesaba katmalıyım

questionTextSource: What lighting is permissible so that you can be seen as early as possible in road traffic during day-light?
explanationSource: During the day in order to be visible you are permitted to use dipped headlights and daytime running lights
answerASource: Dipped headlights
answerBSource: Daytime running lights
answerCSource: Parking light
questionTextTarget: Motosikletinize takılı navigasyon cihazı kullanmak istiyorsunuz. Neye dikkat etmelisiniz?
explanationTarget: Hedefi motosiklet dururken girmeli, mümkünse sürüş sırasında cihazı kullanmaktan kaçınmalı ve kulaklığa entegre sesli yönlendirmeyi kullanmalısınız.
answerBTarget: - mümkünse sürüş sırasında cihazı kullanmaktan kaçınmak
answerCTarget: - kulaklığa entegre sesli çıkış işlevini kullanmak

questionTextSource: You want to exit a parking space and drive onto the road. What must you watch out for in particular?
explanationSource: You should also check on the vehicle especially to children playing. To the possible swiveling out of your vehicle and on the flow of traffic. All three are correct.
answerASource: For children playing around the vehicle
answerBSource: For moving traffic
answerCSource: For my vehicle swinging out sharply
questionTextTarget: Motosiklet sürücüsü için uygun koruyucu kıyafete neler dahil olmalıdır?
explanationTarget: Vücuda oturan motosiklet ceketi ve sırt koruyucu uygun koruma sağlar. Alçak ayakkabılar yeterli koruma değildir.

questionTextSource: Why is it risky to ride without protective motorcycle clothing?
explanationSource: Wearing protective motorcycle clothing will decrease the risk of injury in case of accident and will also protect you against the weather. In case of an accident insurance cover will be reduce if you do not wear protective clothing
answerASource: - an increased risk of injury
answerBSource: - less protection from weather conditions
answerCSource: - less insurance cover available should a damage event occur
questionTextTarget: Motosiklet kullanırken neden uygun motosiklet botları giymelisiniz?
explanationTarget: Motosiklet dururken devrilse bile ciddi ayak yaralanmaları olabilir. Hava koşulları aracın kullanımını etkileyebilir ve kaza halinde sigorta talepleri azaltılabilir.
answerATarget: - motosiklet dururken devrilirse ciddi ayak yaralanmaları olabilir

questionTextSource: Why should you wear protective motorcycle clothing with a high-visibility colouring?
explanationSource: Wearing highly visible colours will make you easier to see and will thus reduce the risk of accidents
answerASource: Because it means others can see me better
answerBSource: Because it reduces the risk of an accident
answerCSource: Because it means I can still drive home if my lights fail
questionTextTarget: Neden görünürlüğü yüksek renkte koruyucu motosiklet kıyafeti giymelisiniz?
explanationTarget: Görünürlüğü yüksek renkler diğer yol kullanıcılarının sizi daha iyi görmesini sağlar ve kaza riskini azaltır.
answerATarget: Çünkü başkaları beni daha iyi görebilir
answerCTarget: Çünkü ışıklarım arızalanırsa yine eve sürebilirim

questionTextSource: As a motorcyclist what should you do to make yourself more visible to others during the daytime?
explanationSource: In order to be more visible and reduce the risk of accidents during the daytime, you should wear highly visible protective clothes and use either the dipped headlights or daytime running lights
answerASource: By wearing high-visibility protective motorcycle clothing
answerBSource: By driving with dipped headlight or daytime running lights switched on
answerCSource: By driving with the main beam light on
questionTextTarget: Motosiklet sürücüsü olarak gündüzleri başkalarının sizi daha iyi görmesi için ne yapmalısınız?
explanationTarget: Gündüz görünürlüğü artırmak için görünürlüğü yüksek koruyucu motosiklet kıyafeti giymeli ve kısa far veya gündüz farı açık sürmelisiniz. Uzun far kullanmak doğru değildir.
answerATarget: Görünürlüğü yüksek koruyucu motosiklet kıyafeti giyerek
answerBTarget: Kısa far veya gündüz farı açık sürerek

questionTextSource: You want to make a right turn within a built-up area. What risks could arise here?
explanationSource: 3 answers are correct. There is both a danger straight run cyclist to miss, as well as pedestrians and compromising by too wide arc oncoming traffic.
answerASource: - fail to see cyclists travelling straight ahead
answerBSource: - fail to see pedestrians
answerCSource: - endangering oncoming traffic by following an excessively wide turning circle
questionTextTarget: Yerleşim içinde sağa dönmek istiyorsunuz. Burada hangi riskler ortaya çıkabilir?
explanationTarget: Sağa dönerken düz giden bisikletlileri ve yayaları görmeyebilirsiniz. Çok geniş dönüş yayı karşı trafiği tehlikeye atabilir.
answerCTarget: - aşırı geniş dönüş yayıyla karşı trafiği tehlikeye atmak

questionTextSource: As the vehicle owner, what change must you report to the relevant licensing authority?
explanationSource: If you change your name or place of residence, you must notify the vehicle licensing authority. However, you do not have to report the change in your liability insurance.
answerASource: - my home address
answerBSource: - my name
answerCSource: - my third-party insurance
questionTextTarget: Araç sahibi olarak hangi değişikliği ilgili tescil makamına bildirmelisiniz?
explanationTarget: Adınız veya ikamet adresiniz değişirse araç tescil makamına bildirmeniz gerekir. Zorunlu mali sorumluluk sigortasındaki değişiklik bu kapsamda değildir.

questionTextSource: You are the new owner of a licensed vehicle. What do you have to do?
explanationSource: When replacing the owner, you do not need to carry out a general inspection. You must inform the vehicle licensing authority that the owner changed and provide them with a third-party liability insurance.
answerASource: - notify the licensing authority of the change in ownership
answerBSource: - present the licensing authority with proof of the existence of liability insurance for the vehicle
answerCSource: - generally arrange for a vehicle roadworthiness test to be performed at the time of the change of ownership
questionTextTarget: Tescilli bir aracın yeni sahibisiniz. Ne yapmalısınız?
explanationTarget: Sahip değişikliğini tescil makamına bildirmeli ve araç için zorunlu mali sorumluluk sigortası bulunduğunu kanıtlamalısınız. Sahip değişikliğinde genel muayene yaptırmak zorunlu değildir.
answerBTarget: - tescil makamına araç için zorunlu mali sorumluluk sigortası kanıtı sunmak
answerCTarget: - sahip değişikliği sırasında genel araç muayenesi yaptırmak

questionTextSource: You should regularly check your helmet visor. Why should you replace it if it is scratched?
explanationSource: A badly scratched helmet visor will diminish your vision and will make light more intensely seen with the risk of dazzling
answerASource: Because I will otherwise be dazzled during hours of darkness
answerBSource: Because my vision will otherwise be restricted
answerCSource: Because my face should always be identifiable
questionTextTarget: Kask vizörünüzü düzenli kontrol etmelisiniz. Çizilmişse neden değiştirmelisiniz?
explanationTarget: Çizilmiş vizör karanlıkta kamaşmaya neden olur ve görüşünüzü kısıtlar. Yüzün her zaman tanınabilir olması sebep değildir.
answerCTarget: Çünkü yüzüm her zaman tanınabilir olmalıdır

questionTextSource: What should you anticipate if you fail to wear suitable protective motorbike clothing when riding a motorbike?
explanationSource: Wearing protective motorcycle clothing will decrease the risk of injury in case of accident and will also protect you against the weather. In case of accident insurance cover will be reduced if you do not wear protective clothing
answerASource: I am at greater risk of injury in the event of falling off the bike
answerBSource: I am not as well protected from the effects of weather conditions
answerCSource: I should anticipate that my insurance payments will be reduced in the event of an accident
questionTextTarget: Motosiklet sürerken uygun koruyucu motosiklet kıyafeti giymezseniz neyi hesaba katmalısınız?
explanationTarget: Uygun koruyucu kıyafet yoksa düşme halinde yaralanma riskiniz artar, hava koşullarına karşı daha az korunursunuz ve kaza halinde sigorta ödemeleri azaltılabilir.
answerATarget: Düşme halinde yaralanma riskim daha yüksek olur
answerBTarget: Hava koşullarının etkilerine karşı daha az korunurum
answerCTarget: Kaza durumunda sigorta ödemelerimin azaltılmasını hesaba katmalıyım

questionTextSource: You want to use a navigation device mounted on your motorcycle. What should you observe?
explanationSource: In order to be able to concentrate fully on the journey, you should use your navigation system attached to the motorbike in a stationary position (enter destination), do not operate the device while driving if possible and use the voice output via a headset if available.
answerASource: - enter the destination while the motorcycle is stationary
answerBSource: - if possible, I should avoid operating the device while driving
answerCSource: - use the voice output function integrated into the headset
questionTextTarget: Motosikletinize takılı navigasyon cihazını kullanmak istiyorsunuz. Neye dikkat etmelisiniz?
explanationTarget: Hedefi motosiklet dururken girmeli, mümkünse sürüş sırasında cihazı kullanmaktan kaçınmalı ve kulaklığa entegre sesli yönlendirmeyi kullanmalısınız.
answerBTarget: - mümkünse sürüş sırasında cihazı kullanmaktan kaçınmak
answerCTarget: - kulaklığa entegre sesli çıkış işlevini kullanmak

questionTextSource: What should be included as suitable protective clothing for a motorcyclist?
explanationSource: The motorbike protective clothing consists of shoes, gloves, jacket, trousers and helmet.
answerASource: A closely fitting motorcycle jacket
answerBSource: Back protector
answerCSource: Low shoes
questionTextTarget: Motosiklet sürücüsü için uygun koruyucu kıyafete neler dahil olmalıdır?
explanationTarget: Vücuda oturan motosiklet ceketi ve sırt koruyucu uygundur. Alçak ayakkabılar motosiklet koruyucu kıyafeti sayılmaz.

questionTextSource: Why should you wear suitable motorcycle boots when riding a motorcycle?
explanationSource: Foot may be injured if tipped over. Vehicle operation may be limited in poor weather conditions. Insurance may refuse to pay in the event of an accident.
answerASource: - serious foot injuries can occur if the motorcycle tips over while stationary
answerBSource: - any accident insurance claims may be reduced
answerCSource: - the operation of the vehicle can be restricted by weather conditions
questionTextTarget: Motosiklet sürerken neden uygun motosiklet botları giymelisiniz?
explanationTarget: Motosiklet dururken devrilse bile ciddi ayak yaralanmaları olabilir. Sigorta talepleri azalabilir ve hava koşulları aracın kullanımını kısıtlayabilir.
answerATarget: - motosiklet dururken devrilirse ciddi ayak yaralanmaları olabilir

questionTextSource: Why should you replace a scratched helmet visor?
explanationSource: You are strongly dazzled by other light and visibility is also limited.
answerASource: - restrict vision
answerBSource: - increase glare
answerCSource: - will cause the visor to become more misted up
questionTextTarget: Çizilmiş kask vizörünü neden değiştirmelisiniz?
explanationTarget: Çizilmiş vizör görüşü kısıtlar ve kamaşmayı artırır. Buğulanmanın tek sebebi bu değildir.
answerCTarget: - vizörün daha fazla buğulanmasına neden olur

questionTextSource: What must you do to protect yourself against head injuries?
explanationSource: The motorbike helmet protects you from head injuries, after an accident you must replace the helmet.
answerASource: - an appropriate, good fitting motorcycle helmet
answerBSource: - a well maintained motorcycle cap
answerCSource: - an officially inspected work safety helmet
questionTextTarget: Baş yaralanmalarına karşı ne yapmalısınız?
explanationTarget: Baş yaralanmalarına karşı uygun, iyi oturan motosiklet kaskı takmalısınız. Motosiklet şapkası veya iş güvenliği kaskı yeterli değildir.
answerCTarget: - resmi olarak kontrol edilmiş iş güvenliği kaskı

questionTextSource: How is it ensured that the rear-view mirror on the bike is working properly?
explanationSource: The rear-view mirror on the two-wheeler must be properly adjusted to the rider - so that he or she can observe all essential traffic. A damaged rearview mirror is not considered to be in proper working order. The rear-view mirror on a motorbike may protrude sideways over the end of the handlebars to provide better coverage of the necessary areas.
answerASource: - must be correctly adjusted
answerBSource: - may not be damaged
answerCSource: - may not extend laterally beyond the handlebars
questionTextTarget: İki tekerlekli araçtaki dikiz aynasının düzgün çalışması nasıl sağlanır?
explanationTarget: Ayna doğru ayarlanmış ve hasarsız olmalıdır. Gerekli görüş için gidonun yanından dışarı taşabilir.

questionTextSource: When driving, what can cause you to miss warning signals?
explanationSource:
Noise that is too loud, such as listening to music that is too loud, can drown out the warning signal and cause you to react to it too late.
Distractions caused by talking on the phone can also mean that you hear warning signals too late or not at all.
answerASource: Listening to loud music
answerBSource: Becoming distracting during a telephone call
answerCSource: Driving at a low engine speed
questionTextTarget: Sürüş sırasında uyarı sinyallerini kaçırmanıza ne neden olabilir?

questionTextSource: What is the benefit of wearing an integral helmet when riding a motorcycle?
explanationSource: A full-face helmet offers more protection than other helmet models, as full-face helmets are completely closed. The chin forms a whole with the helmet and cannot be pushed up, which means you are well protected against injuries. The complete face protection keeps wind, rain and insects away from your eyes. Your eyes are protected against wind and weather by the visor and your vision is not restricted by the weather.
answerASource: - injuries
answerBSource: - insects
answerCSource: - becoming wet

questionTextSource: What should you check on your two-wheeler before moving off?
explanationSource: You should check that the lights on your two-wheeler are working properly every time before you set off. It is also essential to check that the brakes are working before you set off.

answerBSource: The proper functioning of the brakes

questionTextSource: When riding a motorbike, what makes you more visible to other road users?
explanationSource: If you wear eye-catching clothing, for example a motorbike jacket in bright colours or a jacket that reflects light, you will be more visible to other road users.

questionTextSource: What criterion do motorbike boots have to fulfil?
explanationSource:
Pay attention to the exact fit, the boots should fit snugly and reach over your ankles without restricting your freedom of movement.
You should also make sure that the boots have non-slip soles, which provide good grip on the footrests.
answerASource: - have an anti-slip sole

questionTextSource: What criterion do motorbike gloves have to fulfil?
explanationSource:
The motorbike gloves should fit snugly but not be too tight. Your fingers should be slightly bent without the fabric stretching.
The gloves should give you a good grip so that you can operate the brake and clutch levers without any problems.
Choose motorbike gloves made of abrasion-resistant materials such as leather or special textiles in order to be better protected against abrasions and burns in the event of a fall or accident.

answerBSource: - provide a good grip
answerCSource: - are made from abrasion-resistant material

questionTextSource: You are riding a moped with a maximum design speed of 25 km/h. How do you need to protect yourself from head injuries?

questionTextSource: How do you secure a car with a manual gearbox against rolling away on a downhill slope?

questionTextSource: What should be observed when positioning the head rests in your car?
explanationSource: With correctly adjusted headrests the car driver reduces the force on the cervical spine in case of sudden vehicle movements. This makes headrests a direct protection device for the protection of the vehicle occupants in accidents. The headrests that can be adjusted electrically or manually in height and inclination should be adjusted so that the crown height of the head coincides with the top edge of the headrest. In order for their protective function to be fully effective, you should tilt the headrest so that your back of the head is no more than a few centimeters away from it.
answerASource: The top of the head should be level with the upper edge of the head rest
answerBSource: The spacing between the rear of the head and the head rests should be as small as possible
answerCSource: The upper edge of the head rest should conjoin with the upper neck vertebra

You will pay more attention to the person you are talking to and concentrate less on the road. Distraction can cause you to miss something in traffic and not be able to react quickly enough. You should also avoid using your phone in difficult traffic situations.

answerBSource: In complicated traffic conditions
answerCSource: If this would distract me

questionTextSource: You are planning a long journey with your motor vehicle. Before commencing the journey, what should you check on the vehicle to avoid endangering yourself and others?
explanationSource:
You should check your tyres at regular intervals, because wear, damage or incorrectly adjusted air pressure as well as insufficient tread depth represent a major safety risk.
A minimum tread depth of 1.6 mm applies. 
The headlights should also be checked for defects and their correct setting. For example, headlights that are set too high can dazzle oncoming traffic. 
A clear view should be ensured on every journey. This includes not only ensuring that the windscreen is free of dirt, but also that there is still sufficient windscreen washer fluid.
answerASource: The tyres
answerBSource: The headlamp setting
answerCSource: That the windscreen wipers are working properly

questionTextSource: Your car is snowed in. What do you need to do before you start your journey?
explanationSource:
Before you drive off, you must remove the snow from the entire vehicle as it could fall while driving and endanger other road users. In addition, the snow could slide onto your windshield when you brake, blocking your visibility and making you completely unable to act.  Also remove the snow from the lighting equipment so that other road users can see you in good time and you have adequate visibility even in dark lighting conditions. 
Also make sure that no snow covers your license plates. If the license plates are illegible, you risk an administrative offense and a fine.
answerASource: - remove snow from number plate
answerBSource: - remove snow from the vehicle’s roof
answerCSource: - remove snow from the lighting equipment

answerATarget: İzin verilen toplam ağırlığı 7,5 t’yi aşan kamyonlar

questionTextSource: What motor vehicles engaged in the commercial or paid transport of goods, are prohibited from driving on Sundays and public holidays?
explanationSource: The driving ban on Sundays and public holidays applies to License C, i.e. trucks with trailers or trucks with a maximum permissible mass of more than 7.5 tonnes. Cars can still drive.
answerASource: Trucks with a gross vehicle weight rating in excess of 7.5 t
answerBSource: Trucks towing a trailer
answerCSource: Cars towing a trailer
questionTextTarget: Ticari veya ücret karşılığı yük taşımacılığı yapan hangi motorlu araçların pazar ve resmi tatillerde sürüşü yasaktır?
explanationTarget: Yasak, izin verilen toplam ağırlığı 7,5 tondan fazla olan kamyonlar ve römork çeken kamyonlar için geçerlidir. Römorklu otomobiller dahil değildir.
answerATarget: İzin verilen toplam ağırlığı 7,5 t’yi aşan kamyonlar

questionTextSource: The German summer holiday traffic regulations apply to which vehicles used in the transport of goods for hire or reward?
explanationSource: The Holiday Travel Regulation applies to trucks for the commercial or paid transport of goods with a total permissible mass of more than 7.5 t and to trucks with trailers.
answerASource: To trucks with a gross vehicle weight rating in excess of 7.5 t
answerBSource: To trucks with a trailer
answerCSource: To tractors
questionTextTarget: Almanya yaz tatili trafik yönetmeliği, ücretli veya ticari yük taşımacılığında kullanılan hangi araçlar için geçerlidir?
explanationTarget: Tatil trafik yönetmeliği, izin verilen toplam ağırlığı 7,5 tondan fazla olan kamyonlar ve römorklu kamyonlar için geçerlidir. Traktörler bu cevapta yer almaz.
answerATarget: İzin verilen toplam ağırlığı 7,5 t’yi aşan kamyonlar için

questionTextSource: You want to transport goods on a commercial basis or for payment. For which vehicles or vehicle combinations does the holiday travel regulation apply?
explanationSource: The holiday regulations apply to all trucks with a permissible total mass of over 7.5 tonnes and to trucks with trailers.
answerASource: - a maximum permissible mass of over 7.5 t
answerBSource: - a trailer
answerCSource: - a maximum permissible mass of up to 7.5 t
questionTextTarget: Ticari olarak veya ücret karşılığı yük taşımak istiyorsunuz. Tatil trafik yönetmeliği hangi araçlar veya araç kombinasyonları için geçerlidir?
explanationTarget: Tatil trafik yönetmeliği izin verilen toplam ağırlığı 7,5 tondan fazla olan kamyonlar ve römorklu kamyonlar için geçerlidir.
answerATarget: - izin verilen toplam ağırlığı 7,5 t’nin üzerinde olanlar
answerCTarget: - izin verilen toplam ağırlığı 7,5 t’ye kadar olanlar

questionTextSource: You are entering a public road e.g. from a field or building site and considerably soil the road. Who is responsible for eliminating this traffic obstruction?
explanationSource: If you significantly pollute a road due to leaving an unpaved area, then you, the polluter, must clean it.
answerASource: You, as you have caused it
answerBSource: The competent road-building authority
answerCSource: The persons living along this section of the road
questionTextTarget: Tarladan veya şantiyeden kamu yoluna çıkıyor ve yolu önemli ölçüde kirletiyorsunuz. Bu trafik engelinin giderilmesinden kim sorumludur?
explanationTarget: Yolu kirleten siz olduğunuz için bu tehlike ve engelin giderilmesinden siz sorumlusunuz.
answerATarget: Siz, çünkü buna siz sebep oldunuz

questionTextSource: What must you do to avoid endangering others by equipment or load which has fallen off your vehicle?
explanationSource: You must immediately remove any objects from the roadway that have fallen down and endanger other road users. Secure the danger zone. If necessary, contact the police or road services.
answerASource: - remove the parts yourself
answerBSource: - secure the danger spot and immediately inform the road service or police
answerCSource: - proceed and inform the nearest municipal office
questionTextTarget: Aracınızdan düşen ekipman veya yük nedeniyle başkalarını tehlikeye atmamak için ne yapmalısınız?
explanationTarget: Düşen parçaları derhal kaldırmalı, tehlikeli yeri güvenceye almalı ve gerekirse yol servisini veya polisi hemen bilgilendirmelisiniz. En yakın belediyeye haber vermek için devam etmek yeterli değildir.
answerBTarget: - tehlikeli yeri güvenceye almak ve derhal yol servisini veya polisi bilgilendirmek
answerCTarget: - devam edip en yakın belediye ofisine haber vermek

questionTextSource: Your vehicle has left a considerable amount of dirt on the carriageway, causing a risk to road traffic. What do you have to do?
explanationSource: The following road users will thank you if you eliminate immediately the pollution and the danger point to the elimination doing sufficiently marked. In an easy recognition of the danger spot doing nothing is wrong.
answerASource: - clean up the dirt without delay
answerBSource: - properly indicate the point of danger until the cleaning has taken place
answerCSource: - do nothing if the point of danger is easily recognisable
questionTextTarget: Aracınız yolda trafik güvenliği için risk oluşturan ciddi kir bıraktı. Ne yapmalısınız?
explanationTarget: Kiri gecikmeden temizlemeli ve temizlik yapılana kadar tehlikeli yeri usulüne uygun şekilde işaretlemelisiniz. Tehlike kolay fark ediliyorsa hiçbir şey yapmamak doğru değildir.
answerBTarget: - temizlik yapılana kadar tehlikeli yeri usulüne uygun şekilde işaretlemek
answerCTarget: - tehlikeli yer kolay fark ediliyorsa hiçbir şey yapmamak
